summary: Phase 2 testing complete: Enhanced CRM with Kanban Pipeline, CRM Analytics, Product Create/Edit. All 24 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed including Pipeline page with 6 Kanban columns, Analytics page with all metrics, Products page with create/edit drawer.
passed_tests: GET /api/admin/pipeline returns leads grouped by 6 statuses
Pipeline leads have all required fields for Kanban cards
Analytics by_inquiry has inquiry type breakdown
POST /api/admin/products creates product with all fields
POST /api/admin/products creates product with minimal fields
PUT /api/admin/products/:id updates product name and regenerates slug
frontend_tests_passed: Admin sidebar has 5 nav items: Dashboard, Pipeline, Leads, Analytics, Products
Pipeline page loads with 6 Kanban columns: New, Contacted, Qualified, Negotiation, Won, Lost
Pipeline shows 13 leads across 6 stages
Pipeline cards are draggable (draggable='true')
Pipeline cards show: name, hospital, score badge (Hot/Warm/Cold), source, inquiry type, product interest
Pipeline cards have contact icons: phone, whatsapp, email
Pipeline cards show district
Pipeline column counts match actual card counts
Pipeline info bar shows 'AI Chatbot leads auto-populate this pipeline'
Analytics page shows Total Leads stat (13)
Analytics page shows Conversion Rate stat (7.7%)
Analytics page shows Conversion Funnel with all 6 statuses
Analytics page shows Lead Score Distribution (Hot: 7, Warm: 4, Cold: 2)
Analytics page shows Leads by Source (Website: 11, WhatsApp: 2)
Analytics page shows Top Districts (Hyderabad: 6, etc.)
Analytics page shows Leads by Inquiry Type (Bulk Quote: 7, Product Info: 3, etc.)
Analytics page shows Recent Leads list
Products page has Add Product button
Products page shows products table with 45 products
Product create form drawer opens with all fields
Product create form has: name, SKU, division, category, material, description, specs (JSON), sizes, pack size, manufacturer, SEO title, brochure URL, status
Product edit button opens pre-filled form for existing product
Product edit form shows 'Update Product' button
All admin pages require authentication (redirect to /admin/login without token)
critical_code_review_comments: All Phase 2 APIs working correctly with proper authentication
Pipeline API returns leads grouped by 6 statuses as expected
Analytics API returns all required metrics including conversion_rate, by_source, by_score, by_status, by_district, by_inquiry, recent_leads
Product CRUD operations working with all fields including JSON specs and array sizes
All data-testid attributes present for UI testing
seed_data_creation: 13 demo leads seeded across 6 pipeline stages (New: 4, Contacted: 3, Qualified: 2, Negotiation: 2, Won: 1, Lost: 1)

features_verified.pipeline_kanban: 6 columns (New, Contacted, Qualified, Negotiation, Won, Lost) with draggable cards
features_verified.pipeline_cards: Show name, hospital, score badge, source, inquiry type, product interest, contact icons, district
features_verified.analytics_metrics: total_leads, conversion_rate, by_source, by_score, by_status, by_district, by_inquiry, recent_leads
features_verified.analytics_funnel: Conversion funnel showing all 6 statuses with counts and percentages
features_verified.analytics_charts: Score distribution, leads by source, top districts, inquiry types
features_verified.product_create: Form with all fields including JSON specs and comma-separated sizes
features_verified.product_edit: Pre-filled form with Update Product button
features_verified.admin_sidebar: 5 nav items: Dashboard, Pipeline, Leads, Analytics, Products

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 complete. All features working correctly. 13 demo leads across 6 pipeline stages. 45 products in catalog. Pipeline supports drag-and-drop via PUT /api/admin/leads/:id. Analytics shows comprehensive CRM metrics. Products page has full CRUD with create/edit drawer.
